title: Can You Feel the Beat: The Lisa Lisa Story
original_title: Can You Feel the Beat: The Lisa Lisa Story
overview: 15-year-old Puerto Rican Lisa Velez overcomes sexism, racism, and breast cancer to become Latin pop pioneer behind hits like "Can You Feel The Beat," inspiring generations of Latina artists.
